privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rstudio_env audit_benford_fraud task by running the Benford's Law analysis (via the benford.analysis package) on the real corporate.payment dataset. It was independently verified that the dataset is real (from a West Coast utility company, 2010) and that the digit '50' exhibits the highest absolute difference. All expected output paths exactly match the task description and setup/export scripts. I also discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
